data.description:
## Story S6: Legacy harness removal + 24-caller migration (atomic commit)

### Description
**What**: Delete the four legacy scripts (`test-batched.sh`, `nohup-launch.sh`, `nohup-poll.sh`) and the three per-language runner scripts (`plugins/dso/scripts/runners/{bash,pytest,node}-runner.sh`) in a single commit that also migrates every caller to the new primitive. Callers to update include COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md, validate.sh, validate-phase.sh, the test-gate recording script, the per-commit test-gate hook, deps.sh, post-functions.sh, pre-bash-functions.sh, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, and approximately 15 referencing test files.
**Why**: This is the largest blast-radius story. Doing it atomically avoids a transitional state where both systems coexist (explicitly rejected in brainstorm). A pre-merge canary worktree validation is the rollback strategy.
**Scope**:
- IN: script deletions, caller updates, tree-wide grep verification, pre-merge canary run
- OUT: plugin version bump + shim error messaging (S7), before/after measurement (S8)

### Done Definitions
- When this story is complete, `test-batched.sh`, `nohup-launch.sh`, `nohup-poll.sh`, and `plugins/dso/scripts/runners/{bash,pytest,node}-runner.sh` do not exist in the tree
  ← Satisfies: "test-batched.sh, nohup-launch.sh, nohup-poll.sh, and plugins/dso/scripts/runners/{bash,pytest,node}-runner.sh are deleted in the same commit as the callers are migrated"
- When this story is complete, `grep -rn 'test-batched\|nohup-launch\|nohup-poll\|scripts/runners/' plugins/ tests/ docs/` returns zero live references (CHANGELOG and historical commit messages excluded from the count)
  ← Satisfies: "A tree-wide grep for the four removed script basenames plus the scripts/runners/ path returns zero live references after the epic lands (matches in CHANGELOG and historical commit messages are out of scope)"
- When this story is complete, all callers listed in the epic spec (COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md, validate.sh, validate-phase.sh, test-gate recording script, per-commit test-gate hook, deps.sh, post-functions.sh, pre-bash-functions.sh, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, ~15 tests) invoke either the new primitive or the config key, as appropriate
  ← Satisfies: "COMMIT-WORKFLOW.md, validate.sh, validate-phase.sh, the test-gate recording script, the per-commit test-gate hook, deps.sh, post-functions.sh, pre-bash-functions.sh, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, and every referencing test file (approximately 15) are updated"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic
- When this story is complete, a pre-merge canary worktree runs the full commit workflow end-to-end against a fresh clone and completes successfully
  ← Satisfies: epic Approach "pre-merge canary worktree validation"

### Considerations
- [Reliability] Atomic commit breaks bisect for this range — the rollback path is a revert, documented in the implementation plan
- [Testing] Every test file referencing a deleted script must be updated or deleted in the same commit; test-gate recording must succeed on the updated tree
- [Maintainability] Commit message must enumerate the deleted scripts and point readers at this epic for context
## Escalation Policy
**Escalation policy**: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue — one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
data.title: As a DSO maintainer, legacy harness scripts are removed and all 24 callers migrated in one atomic commit
